result.stdout:
Usage:

  dotnet-arbor-nuget [options] [command]


Options:

  --version
         Show version information

  -?, -h, --help
    Show help and usage information


Commands:

  nuspec
              Create nuspec

  package
             Create nuspec

  pack
                pack .nuspec file

  package-metadata
    Package metadata

result.stdout:
create:

  Create description


Usage:

  dotnet-arbor-nuget nuspec create [options]


Options:

  --source-directory <source-directory>
            Source directory

  --output-file <output-file>
                      Output file

  --package-id <package-id>
                        Package id

  --package-version <package-version>
              Package version (semver)

  --version-file <version-file>
                    Version file, Arbor KV json file

  --msbuild-version-file <msbuild-version-file>
    Version file, any XML-based csproj or Directory.Build.props

  --package-directory <package-directory>
          NuGet package output directory

  --pre-release-version <pre-release-version>
      NuGet package output directory

  -?, -h, --help
                                   Show help and usage information
